info.title: djtools
info.description: .NET CLI tools for DJs to streamline library management across Rekordbox and Mixed In Key, reduce friction between apps, and automate reliable sync workflows.

commands.name: delete-tracks
commands.description: Bulk delete tracks marked for deletion, if they're added to the 'LIBRARY MANAGEMENT > Delete' playlist

commands.name: sync-mik-tags-to-rekordbox
commands.description: Sync Mixed In Key key tag for M4A tracks & energy level back into Rekordbox XML collection. This also sets a colour to the track based on the energy level.

commands.name: sync-rekordbox-library-to-mik
commands.description: Replicate Rekordbox playlist/folder hierarchy into Mixed In Key database (additive). Optionally reset MIK library before syncing.

commands.name: sync-mik-folder-to-rekordbox
commands.description: Mirror a Mixed In Key folder hierarchy back into Rekordbox XML under a dedicated folder; idempotent and supports --what-if.
